pass_threshold: every dimension >= 1 AND all gate dimensions == 2

dimensions.criterion: Load is offline / latency-tolerant; realtime/streaming is rejected as out of scope.
custom_id is unique and stable from the business ID; uniqueness validated before send, raises on duplicate.
create -> poll processing_status (backoff, until ended) -> results, with batch.id persisted before polling.
Results split by result.type: succeeded persisted; errored/expired/canceled routed to retry.
Only failed custom_id retried; cap > 0; unresolved IDs returned on exhaustion.
No synchronous one-by-one messages.create() on the offline path.
When required, JSON report passes scripts/check.sh; evidence tags from one family; no invented prices.
